reason: Authoritative ElevenLabs internal API contract: endpoints, multipart form fields, auth (Firebase JWT refresh), task object shape, export flow, field mapping UI→API. The implementer must read this before writing any HTTP call.
Web modal UI structure + full 157-language list (display names). Needed for the list-languages table and to confirm which toggles map to which API fields.
Single-file CLI with shared config/session helpers — check for duplication before repeating patterns across login/transcribe/list-languages subcommands.
